Article Title: Claire Taillon: Who is Claire Taillon? Inside the life of Jameson Taillon’s wife as the Team Canada pitcher plays at the World Baseball Classic
Article Text:
Claire Taillon (Image Via Getty)

Jameson Taillon’s wife Claire supported the pitcher through his cancer battle and MLB journey





Chicago Cubs pitcher Jameson Taillon is currently representing Team Canada at the 2026 World Baseball Classic, adding another chapter to his long baseball journey. The right-handed starter first entered Major League Baseball after being selected by the Pittsburgh Pirates as the No. 2 overall pick in the 2010 MLB Draft. Having started his MLB career in 2016, he has since established a dependable starting pitcher and subsequently played for the New York Yankees before signing with the Chicago Cubs.Away from the field, Taillon has been silently supported throughout the highs and lows of his career by his wife, Claire Taillon. Though the couple wishes their personal life to be a secret, Claire has been by the side of the MLB pitcher for years. From career milestones to tough medical problems, she has been there every step of the way as Taillon still competes at the highest level of baseball.Although Jameson Taillon and Claire keep their relationship mostly out of the public spotlight, several reports say the two have known each other since they were young. Their friendship eventually grew into a relationship, and the couple later decided to spend their lives together.Jameson Taillon and Claire officially got married on January 20, 2024. According to reports, Claire works as a real estate agent. During the baseball offseason, the couple spends time in Scottsdale, Arizona, where they own a home reportedly valued at around $3.4 million.While Claire usually stays away from public attention, her role became especially important during one of the most difficult periods in Taillon’s life.Early in the MLB season of 2017, Jameson Taillon was found to have testicular cancer. The news shook the baseball fraternity. Taillon remained determined to battle the disease and get back to baseball even after the terrifying diagnosis.Claire stayed with him every step of that trying time. Her encouragement kept Taillon concentrated throughout recovery and treatment.According to an Instagram post shared by Jameson Taillon, the pitcher thanked many people who helped him through the journey, including his family, medical team, and loved ones.Taillon wrote: “Feeling as driven as ever! I’m going to attack this rehab with everything I’ve got, and I will be back.” He also thanked the doctors and hospital staff who helped during treatment, writing:“Thank you to Dr. Altchek and the entire staff at Hospital for Special Surgery for the unparalleled care and making the process as smooth as possible.”Even during that difficult year, Taillon showed remarkable strength. The pitcher still managed to make 25 starts during the 2017 MLB season.Today, Taillon continues his professional career while representing Canada on the international stage, with Claire still standing beside him as one of his strongest supporters.
Article Summary: Chicago Cubs pitcher Jameson Taillon is currently representing Team Canada at the 2026 World Baseball Classic. Taillon's wife, Claire, has been by his side throughout his MLB career and cancer battle. The couple keep their personal life out of the public spotlight, but reports say the two have known each other since they were young.

Auston Matthews is enjoying one of the biggest years of his career, after coming off a landmark performance at the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics, where Team USA won its first men's hockey gold since 1980. The couple made their relationship public in early March when she posted a series of photos on Instagram from the Milano Cortina 2026 Winter Olympics, showing her celebrating with Matthews after he won gold with Team USA.Speculations suggest that Piunno has been dating Matthews for quite some time, and it is evident from the pictures that she has shared recently on her social media handle.Her post showed several moments from the Olympic trip that celebrated Matthews’ historic achievement.As per reports, Piunno took to Instagram to share photos from the 2026 Winter Olympic Games in Milano Cortina. “A month to remember forever,” Piunno captioned a post that included her posing with Matthews after his gold medal win.This announcement stole the limelight, raising speculation on Matthew's separation from his former long-time girlfriend Emily Ruttledge, who was a licensed therapist. Article Title: Fact check: Did Adin Ross and Isa make their relationship public after Isa’s Instagram post and Kick Champ claim?
Article Text:
Fact check: Did Adin Ross and Isa make their relationship public after Isa’s Instagram post and Kick Champ claim? (Image via Getty)

Adin Ross earlier told fans Isa wanted to “ease into” streaming before appearing on his live broadcasts





Adin Ross is once again trending online, but this time the talk is not about a stream or a gaming moment. Instead, it is about his rumored relationship with Isa. On March 9, 2026, an X account called Kick Champ posted a message claiming that Adin Ross and Isa had finally made their relationship public. The post quickly spread across social media and many fans started talking about it. Kick Champ wrote in its post, “Adin Ross and his fiancée Isa made their relationship public in a new Instagram post.” The claim caught attention because Adin Ross has mentioned Isa many times during his live streams since 2025.Just before that post appeared online, Isa shared a slideshow of pictures on her Instagram account @isavbarr. The photos showed her wearing different outfits, some pictures of the places around her, and one photo of a person holding a large bouquet of roses. The final image in the slideshow also grabbed attention and quickly became a topic among fans. However, despite the online excitement, neither Adin Ross nor Isa has directly said that they are dating. At the time of writing, there is no clear public confirmation from either of them.The speculation around Adin Ross and Isa did not start recently. Fans have been hearing about Isa during Ross’s streams for quite some time. In fact, Adin Ross spoke about her during a live stream in July 2025 when viewers asked if she would appear on his broadcasts.During that stream, Ross explained that Isa was open to joining but wanted to take things slowly before appearing in front of the audience. Speaking to his viewers, he said, “No, no, no. It’s going to happen, chat. We’re going to ease into it. Alright? We’re going to ease into it. We’ll start with Minecraft, then IRL. And guys, the third or fourth one, Adin, Cuffem, Jayne, Isa, bang!”Ross was talking about the idea of Isa slowly getting comfortable with streaming before joining him and his friends like Cuffem and Jayne during a broadcast.Now, the recent Instagram slideshow has once again brought attention to the rumored relationship. One of the images in Isa’s post shows Adin Ross during one of his PO box opening streams. In that picture, he is holding underwear that has the printed line, “This a*s belongs to Isa.” The image quickly caught fans’ attention online.Still, it is important to note that the claim about the relationship becoming public came from Kick Champ on X, which is known for posting speculative or engagement-focused content. As of now, neither Adin Ross nor Isa has confirmed that they are in a relationship.
Article Summary: Adin Ross is once again trending online, but this time the talk is about his rumored relationship with Isa. On March 9, 2026, an X account called Kick Champ posted a message claiming that Adin Ross and Isa had finally made their relationship public. The claim caught attention because Adin Ross has mentioned Isa many times during his live streams since 2025.

Article Title: How Shohei Ohtani, Juan Soto, and Aaron Judge built their massive MLB fortunes
Article Text:
Juan Soto (Image via Getty Images)

Shohei Ohtani made a financial empire out of global stardom

Juan Soto's Mets contract and increasing number of endorsements

Aaron Judge’s historic Yankees contract turned into massive wealth

Most wealthy MLB players are creating history





Major League Baseball's biggest stars are no longer just top athletes; they are global brands with multi-million dollar contracts. Over the past 10 years, MLB salaries have increased as teams try to lock in their franchise players during their prime years. Players like Shohei Ohtani, Juan Soto, and Aaron Judge have accumulated incredible wealth owing to their combination of record-breaking contracts, signing bonuses, and long-term perfect performances. Their deals are indicative of how modern baseball has made previously unheard-of financial opportunities for generational talent.Shohei Ohtani's fortune skyrocketed when he signed a 10-year, $700 million contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers starting in 2024. As per Spotrac data, the deal is in place through 2033 and has an average annual value of $70 million. However, there is a historic financial structure to the contract in that approximately $680 million is deferred until 2034-2043, meaning Ohtani only receives $2 million in the contract years, annually, before collecting the bulk of the money later on.Even before the deal, Ohtani had $46 million in career on-field earnings with the largest portfolio of endorsements in sports.Ohtani has signed with brands such as New Balance, Seiko, Fanatics, and Topps. He also has a notable partnership with Japanese beverage company ITO EN's Oi Ocha, a green tea brand. The collaboration began in 2024 and made Ohtani the face of international campaigns to promote the drink throughout Japan and the United States.Soto became the focal point of the biggest contract in baseball's history when the New York Mets signed him to a 15-year, $765 million, starting in 2025, per Spotrac. The agreement carries an average salary of $51 million per year and a $75 million signing bonus, as well as an opt-out clause at the end of the 2029 season. As his profile has increased, there has also been a growing number of major brands that have partnered with him. Soto has endorsements with companies like Under Armour and Wilson, while his newfound star power is continuing to broaden his commercial opportunities both in Latin America and the US.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Aaron Judge's financial breakthrough came after his historic 62 home run season in 2022 that set a new American League record. The New York Yankees rewarded their franchise slugger with a nine-year, $360 million contract to begin in 2023. The deal is in place through 2031 and pays an average of $40 million a year. Spotrac data shows Judge has already made more than $156 million in career salary, a figure that will increase significantly throughout the contract's lifespan. Off the field, Judge has amassed one of the strongest endorsement portfolios in baseball with partnerships with Adidas, Pepsi, Rawlings, and Topps. He has also invested in charitable efforts and brand partnerships related to his position as Yankees captain.The financial success of Ohtani, Soto, and Judge is indicative of the way the business of baseball has changed. Today's superstars have huge guaranteed contracts, as well as global marketing opportunities that go far beyond the diamond. As MLB revenues continue to grow and interest has been expanding globally, the next generation of MLB players may follow the same blueprint, turning elite performance into billion-dollar careers on and off the field.
Article Summary: Major League Baseball's biggest stars are no longer just top athletes; they are global brands with multi-million dollar contracts. Over the past 10 years, MLB salaries have increased as teams try to lock in their franchise players during their prime years. Players like Shohei Ohtani, Juan Soto, and Aaron Judge have accumulated incredible wealth owing to their combination of record-breaking contracts.

Article Title: WWE RAW News Roundup: The Judgment Day betrays Finn Balor, The Usos seek an apology from CM Punk and more
Article Text:
Image via WWE

The Judgment Day betrayed Finn Balor



CM Punk and The Usos' in-ring segment

What are the other highlights from WWE RAW this week?





Welcome to The Times of India's WWE RAW News Roundup. The red brand aired its March 9 episode from the Climate Pledge Arena in Seattle, Washington, which was a highly captivating show to witness on the road to WrestleMania 42. The WWE Intercontinental title in the Men's division saw a major title match, while a new No.1 contender was crowned for the women's division. However, apart from that, the WWE Universe witnessed two major shockers that could alter the landscape of RAW going forward.This week's show saw an in-ring segment with all members of The Judgment Day. Dominik Mysterio came out with Liv Morgan and Raquel Rodriguez. He blamed Finn Balor for losing the IC title last week.Balor came out alongside JD McDonagh. Balor and Dominik continue to have an argument over his title match loss. Things escalated so much that Balor hit Dominik with a Pele Kick and Slingblade. As he was about to inflict more damage, he was intercepted by JD McDonagh. All four members began to attack him. Mysterio took him out with a steel hammer. He then delivered a 619 and Frogsplash from the top rope. However, Mysterio went up a second time to deliver a Frogsplash with JD holding a chair on Balor's chest.This marked the exit of Balor from the group as the rest of them stood tall.CM Punk came out at the end of the show. He went to berate Roman Reigns and said that he was not a fighting champion during his record-setting title reign. The Usos came out and told Punk that he needed to apologize, not for Reigns but their entire family. Punk spoke about the time he spent with different members of The Usos' family, but they continue to urge him to apologize. He did, but only to see how Reigns treated his Bloodline members for years. The show ended with Jey Uso pushing him down and a major stare-off between them to close the show.Bayley outlasted an array of top WWE superstars in a Gauntlet match. She became the new No.1 contender and will now challenge AJ Lee for the WWE Women's Intercontinental title next week on RAW. Oba Femi picked up a huge win over Rusev. Lastly, Penta managed to have his first successful IC title defence against the Original El Grande Americano. In other news, Brock Lesnar and Roman Reigns will make their return to Monday Night RAW to continue to build on their respective programs on the road to WrestleMania 42.Also read: WWE RAW Results & Highlights 9-march-2026: Bayley becomes No.1 contender, huge title match, major betrayal and more
Article Summary: WWE RAW aired its March 9 episode from the Climate Pledge Arena in Seattle, Washington. The WWE Intercontinental title in the Men's division saw a major title match, while a new No.1 contender was crowned for the women's division. This week's show saw an in-ring segment with all members of The Judgment Day.

Article Title: Hockey World Cup Qualifiers: India rally, share points with Scotland
Article Text:
India vs Scotland Women's Hockey (ANI Photo)

Jay Shah: Kapil Dev deserves more credit for 1983 World Cup triumph





HYDERABAD: Scotland proved to be a tough nut to crack as India rallied from a goal down to draw the match 2-2 in the FIH women’s World Cup hockey qualifier Pool B match here on Monday.Despite the draw, India are at the top of the table with four points, ahead of Scotland on goal difference. While the visitors scored through McEwan Heather and Fiona Burnett in the sixth and 33 minutes, Naveet Kaur (18th minute) and Sunelita Toppo (29th minute) scored for India.Heather deflected the ball from drag flicker Eadie Jennifer into the goalpost to put Scotland ahead. Navneet found the equaliser two minutes into the second quarter through a penalty corner. Though the trap was unsuccessful again, Kaur gained control of the ball and hit it into goal.The visitors had a chance to go ahead in the seventh minute of the quarter after a penalty corner but goalkeeper Bichu Devi successfully thwarted it. India took the lead through a penalty corner on the brink of the quarter. Sunelita tapped the ball in from a deflection of Scotland’s Katie Birch after a tussle in front of the post to give the hosts an advantage at the half-time.Results:India (Navneet Kaur 18’, Sunelieta Toppo 29’) drew Scotland 2 (McEwan Heather 6’, Fiona Burnet 33’).Italy 3 (Federica Bormida 19’, Lola Brea 21’, Eleonora Paola Di 45’) bt Austria 0.England 3 (Lily Walker 16’, Elizabeth Neal 38’, Grace Balsdon 44’) Korea 0.Uruguay 3 (Manuela Vilar 29’, Agustina Diaz 36’, Teresa Viana 41’) bt Wales 2 (Anja Atkin 5’, Rachel Goodwin 48’).
Article Summary: India are at the top of the table with four points, ahead of Scotland on goal difference. McEwan Heather deflected the ball from drag flicker Eadie Jennifer into the goalpost to put Scotland ahead. Navneet found the equaliser two minutes into the second quarter through a penalty corner.

Article Title: Sanju Samson takes giant strides at the T20 World Cup with ‘minute adjustments’
Article Text:
Sanju Samson (AP Photo)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

Dhol, cheers and flowers: How Delhi welcomed Gautam Gambhir

ALSO READ:





AHMEDABAD: There have been subtle changes for the better in Sanju Samson ’s game. The T20 World Cup’s player of the tournament now has a remarkable steadiness when he plays his shots or is charging the bowler. The fidgety, twitchy version of Samson we saw earlier is gone.The changes can be attributed to the lean run prior to the World Cup in the T20I series against New Zealand, which led to his omission from the squad and prompted serious introspection.With opposition teams targeting India with off-spin early in the Powerplay to neutralise left-hander Abhishek Sharma’s power hitting, and with Rinku Singh being under-utilised down the order, India rejigged their lineup and brought in Sanju.Suddenly, the pieces seemed to fit and India had the perfect batting order for the occasion. Samson smashed three crucial, consecutive half-centuries, was India’s leading scorer with 321 runs from five innings and has probably hit upon the kind of consistency which eluded him for long periods of his career.Now, Samson is also the leading Indian run-scorer in a single edition of the T20 World Cup.“As soon as we brought him (back), the game changed completely (for us),” captain Suryakumar Yadav said.“He started batting differently. That was a positive call for him. I saw him working very hard. When someone doesn’t play, what he does (outside the playing field) is more important. He did everything he could for the team when he was not playing. The last three to four innings he has batted for the team, it is a result of all the hard work he has put in,” said Surya, highlighting the hard yards in the nets by the opener.One of Samson’s earliest coaches, Biju George, told TOI, “Every batsman over a long tournament brings in minute adjustments. He just kept faith in his ability and backed himself. He kept hitting straight and strong.”Sanju’s batting now has the distinct clarity it lacked earlier. New Zealand captain Mitchell Santner said Samson had changed his approach from the bilateral series earlier.“Unfortunate for us, he was saving his runs for the World Cup. In a few of those games, he looked like he was trying to hit from ball one. Now, he gave himself a chance, gave himself a few balls. On these wickets, when you’re in, you can really cash in,” Santner said.
Article Summary: Sanju Samson was India’s leading scorer with 321 runs from five innings. Samson is also the leading Indian run-scorer in a single edition of the T20 World Cup. New Zealand captain Mitchell Santner said Samson had changed his approach from the bilateral series.

Article Title: Meet new F1 WAG Lauren Fitzsimmons: Isack Hadjar’s girlfriend who supported him at his Red Bull debut at Australian Grand Prix
Article Text:
Isack Hadjar's girlfriend Lauren Fitzsimmons cheered him on at the Australian Grand Prix. (Image credit: Instagram)

Isack Hadjar’s girlfriend Lauren Fitzsimmons helped a fan at the Australian Grand Prix



Who is Isack Hadjar’s blonde girlfriend Lauren Fitzsimmons?







Isack Hadjar made his Red Bull debut at the Australian Grand Prix in Melbourne on Sunday. Cheering for him from the paddock was his girlfriend, Lauren Fitzsimmons. The French driver proved he was worthy of a Red Bull seat alongside Max Verstappen by delivering an impressive performance in qualifying, where he finished third. However, his unfortunate crash in the final race ended his chances of converting it into a decent finish. Naturally, Fitzsimmons’ presence at the Albert Park Circuit must have been comforting for the driver as she turned up in blue as his biggest cheerleader.Taking to Instagram, Isack Hadjar’s girlfriend Lauren Fitzsimmons shared pictures of herself posing at the Albert Park Circuit on Sunday. Comfortably dressed in a sky-blue shirt and matching shorts, Fitzsimmons made sure she was there to cheer for Hadjar on his Red Bull debut.“The name’s Loz, missed u aus <33,” she wrote in the caption along with a shaking-head emoji.Hadjar was quick to drop a like on her pictures. Reacting to the post, a fan revealed how she helped them get an autograph from Hadjar. “Thank you so much for helping Isack sign my cap. You are both so nice,” the fan wrote.Many others commented, “She’s so gorgeous”, while some called her “beautiful” in the comments section.Hadjar, however, called it a “sh*t race” because his Red Bull debut ended in a crash despite what he had achieved in qualifying the day before.Sharing a few pictures from the weekend on Instagram, the 21-year-old wrote, “Might’ve been a sh!t race, but I got to see @alexvolkanovski! Lots of positives from that weekend, we get to try again in China.”Lauren Fitzsimmons has a solid presence online, with 39.7K followers and boyfriend Isack Hadjar being one of them. After Hadjar’s promotion from Racing Bulls as a replacement for Yuki Tsunoda at Red Bull, her popularity could rise as she becomes one of the newest WAGs on the F1 circuit. She appears to be a model who travels between Ontario and London, and her Instagram profile reflects her love for travel, food, fun, and friends.According to The Sun, the two started dating around the Monaco Grand Prix, held in May last year. If one looks deeper into her Instagram, rare glimpses of Hadjar can be found inside her photo dumps. The couple were also vacationing together during the pre-season break. On 29 January, Lauren shared several snaps from her holidays in Canada and Cannes, and one picture showed Hadjar shyly posing beside his mean machine.Hadjar had shared a subtle hint of her inside the photo dump around the New Year, which had yacht rides, snowy vacations, and other moments from their time together.Fans may see more of the new WAG this season as Isack Hadjar gears up for the next race in Shanghai, the Chinese Grand Prix. It will be followed by the Japanese Grand Prix two weeks after the Round 2 race.Also read: “Want proper F1 on steroids”: Max Verstappen urges FIA changes; Oliver Bearman says racing at Australian GP felt like Formula E
Article Summary: Isack Hadjar made his Red Bull debut at the Australian Grand Prix on Sunday. Cheering for him from the paddock was his girlfriend, Lauren Fitzsimmons. The two started dating around the Monaco Grand Prix, held in May last year. Hadjar had shared a subtle hint of her inside the photo dump around the New Year.

Article Title: Mitch Marner’s net worth in 2026: How the Golden Knights built his wealth and financial profile
Article Text:
Mitch Marner views the chance to win the Stanley Cup to come to the Golden Knights. (Images via Getty Images)

Mitch Marner’s net worth and career earnings in 2026

Mitch Marner’s endorsements and brand deals





Mitch Marner is one of the most promising right-wingers who has solidified his place and has quickly established himself as a dynamic force of the Vegas Golden Knights since July 1, 2025. The forward is known for his speed, creativity, and competitiveness, which have led him to reach several milestones in his career.Marner surpassed the 100-point mark for the first time in 2024-25. His decade-long run in Toronto ended when he was traded to the Vegas Golden Knights on July 1, 2025, where he signed an eight-year, $96 million contract after posting a career-best 102 points. He said that the chance to win the Stanley Cup was at the forefront of his decision to come to the Golden Knights.According to the NHL , in this season, the NHL player has played 63 games, with 18 goals, 47 assists, scoring a total of 65 points, and a 15 plus-minus rating. In addition to this, Marner has 500 career points in just 467 games, and a career-high 99 points in 2022-23, which earned him a Selke Trophy nomination for his defensive play.Apart from his successful career, he has also earned significant wealth over the years. Let’s take a look at how he has built his net worth and career earnings in 2026.Over the years, Mitch Marner has earned a substantial amount of wealth with his playmaking skills. According to Sportskeeda, Marner estimates a net worth of between $20 million and $25 million. He has primarily built his wealth from playing for several NHL teams.After serving the Toronto Maple Leafs, his recent move to the Vegas Golden Knights has increased his value and recognition in the league. Marner signed a contract extension of $96 million with Vegas, with an average annual value of $12 million, adding to his annual net worth.Reports suggest that Mitch Marner's career earnings have rapidly grown over the years due to his sheer hard work and excellent performance on the ice. He is expected to exceed $83 million by mid-2025.His career earnings are massively fueled by his 8-year, $96 million contract signed with the Vegas Golden Knights in 2025, including his earlier deals as well. According to Puckpedia, it is estimated that his total career earnings are around $97.65 million by late 2025, including his significant contracts.As Marner continues to reign in the hockey league, his skills on the ice rink have brought him good endorsement deals, giving a significant boost to his financial earnings. Though much is known about his new contracts, Marner has signed an endorsement and aligned himself with world-famous brands like Nike, Beats by Dre, RedBull, Amazon Canada, Oakley, and Intact Insurance. He earns a significant amount from these brand deals and endorsements.
Article Summary: Mitch Marner is one of the most promising right-wingers who has solidified his place and has quickly established himself as a dynamic force of the Vegas Golden Knights. The forward is known for his speed, creativity, and competitiveness, which have led him to reach several milestones in his career. According to Sportskeeda, Marner estimates a net worth of between $20 million and $25 million. He has primarily built his wealth from playing for several NHL teams.
